hotel_name: NHÀ NGHỈ NAM PHƯƠNG (NHA NGHI NAM PHUONG)

reviews.title: Very dirty and noisy hotel.
reviews.text: I caught three very large cockroaches in the bathroom. I reserved a room with a city view, but there's one window in the hallway, it smells, it's dirty, and it's noisy. Please never come here; this is the dirtiest room I've ever seen.

reviews.title: Lo recomiendo
reviews.positives: La ubicación y el personal excelente. No hablan inglés pero con el traductor nos entendimos y hacen lo posible por ayudar.
reviews.negatives: La habitación estaba muy limpia cuando llegué, pero no limpiaron la habitación ningún día. No quitaron la basura ni pusieron toallas limpias.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Near the birdhouse, it is very noisy, old, and degraded.

reviews.title: Chambre sympathique pour une nuit ☺️ Emplacement parfait pour transition vers Phu Quoc !
reviews.positives: Le personnel ! Génial
reviews.negatives:
La propreté, l’équipement. 
Chambre très très humide et pas forcément « propre »

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: This is a new guesthouse, the rooms are not clean and the bathroom is too dirty, not meeting the needs of the guests.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
L'emplacement en plein centre près du marché 
Confortable. Chambre assez grande propreté
reviews.negatives:
Prix élevé pour le niveau de l'hôtel. Pas de possibilité de communiquer avec le gérant.pour la réservation bus et taxis il a fallut s'en occuper nous même et la location du scooter le double de ce que l'on trouve ailleurs 
Cris d'oiseaux par haut parleur toute la nuit et le jour (par les voisins)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: old room, wifi + 4g cannot work in the room (feels like being in prison).

reviews.title: Un très bon rapport qualité prix, bon emplacement, bon accueil.
reviews.positives: L'hôtel est très bien placé au centre ville à une rue du marché. La chambre, sans être très spacieuse, était très confortable, avec une salle de bain privative, un ventilateur et une clim. Les gens qui 'mont accueilli sont très gentils, m'ont offert de l'eau, m'ont donné de bons renseignements quand j'en ai eu besoin.
reviews.negatives: Rien.

reviews.title: Moldy room
reviews.text: The room smells terribly musty. The hotel is very crowded. The bed is very hard, and the pillow is hard. It's a six-person room but only two blankets are provided. The air conditioner broke down at midnight. When calling the reception, no one was on duty. Cars have to be parked on the street. The bathroom floor is tiled and very slippery. The only plus point is that the bathroom is clean.

reviews.title: Bon séjour
reviews.positives: Rien de spécial
reviews.negatives: Rien...pollution plastique

reviews.title: Room with 2 double beds
reviews.text: The price of 500 is okay, but the room is too terrible, disgusting, and smells bad.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Très bon emplacement. Gentillesse du personnel.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: The amenities are very poor compared to the room price.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Accueil chaleureux
reviews.negatives: Néant

reviews.title: Quite run down
reviews.text: Fridge sunk into the rack cannot open the door. TV no remote control or button on the equipment itself. Too few socket outlet. Staff sleeping at the reception instead of providing security.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Die Zimmerbeschreibung war u.a. mit Balkon. Das Zimmer hatte kein Fenster und der Balkon war nicht Teil des Zimmers - nach Protest gab's ein Zimmer mit Fenster - fuehle mich auf den Arm genommen.

reviews.title: good size room in the buzzy center of Ha Tien
reviews.text:
if you dont mind sleeping in the buzziest strip of Ha Tien in in general noisy Vietnam, then its the best place for you. Amaizing kind hosts will care for you.  If you mind a 24/7 higher noiselevel, stay away or bring some sleepers or earplugs.  It seems like lately getting this kinda noisy birdbreeding or nest making Birdhouse facilities quite popular and one of those is just in the nabourhood.  Please be aware.  Apart from this you cant beat the location, right walking distance to the market halls and the promenade on the river overlooking the landmark bridge. 
We got there just by accident and loved the convinience of the location and the friendliest  kind hosts will hosts u can imagine. 2 thumbs up 👍👍

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: ."Garage" die Mopeds könnten direkt neben der Rezeption geparkt werden. Ums Eck war der 🐟 und Gemüse Markt.
reviews.negatives: Ein Vogelhaus mit fettem Lautsprecher, die ganze Nacht. Kakerlaken 🙄. Sicher weder dieses, noch ein Hotel in der Nähe.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The hotel is rated quite okay; however, other guests really lack consideration. They have their own keys but keep barging in and knocking on the doors. I stayed for one night and had the door opened and knocked on 5 or 6 times without permission. Also, the room door might be loose because it could still be opened even when locked, unless the top lock is used, which would prevent it from being opened completely.

reviews.title: teleurstellend
reviews.positives: Personeel is behulpzaam, heet water is goed.
reviews.negatives: ik heb een 2-persoonskamer met uitzicht geboekt, maar kreeg een slaapzaal achtige kamer zonder balkon, erger nog geen raam. Onderhoud en hygiene laat er veel wensen over; spinwebs op de muren, vuil en viezigheid op vloer langs de bedden, zag een dikke kakkerlak in de badkamer in het midden van de nacht. De dag daarna is kamer gewisseld.  Ik twijfel ook of de bedgoed verfrist wordt.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: I had a bad experience here! I forgot my watch and lost it.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: 房间非常干净，老板和员工都非常热情，很贴心，行李寄存，帮忙找出租，还帮我联系巴士，巴士晚点了，到晚上很晚了还没有来，老板依旧很热心帮我联系巴士，非常感谢！
reviews.negatives: 无

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Great location amazing staff right near the market

reviews.title: Rất tệ
reviews.positives: Địa điểm tốt nhưng phòng nhỏ và có mùi hôi
reviews.negatives: Phòng ốc không sạch sẽ

reviews.title: Valuable, considerate
reviews.text: Everything is fine, there is an elevator. The guesthouse is near the market, you can buy seafood at the nearby market, then boil and cook it yourself, borrowing kitchen utensils, tables, and plastic chairs from the hotel’s kitchen. We are very satisfied, and if given the chance, we would stay overnight at Nam Phuong hotel again. The room has a fan. The air conditioner works well, but it only has ON or OFF; you have to turn it off at midnight if it's too cold (causing electricity waste).

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Phòng bẩn, nước chảy yếu, trang thiết bị cũ, nước uống không có, nước nóng điện mặt trời nên không nóng

reviews.title: Budget accomodation
reviews.text: Aircond is cold, toilet space is quite small, water pressure is good, thick dust on top of the aircon, owner sometime have karaoke in the evening until 10pm, swiftlet sound everywhere in the city, location is good, in the city center, friendly owner.

reviews.text: Great, the hotel is clean, very convenient for eating and transportation as it's close to the market. The shower faucet is a bit hard to use, but it's still very good.

reviews.negatives: Location
